title: ProductCard
description: One product card extracted from a search-results page (mirrors the WIT `product-card` record in common/wit/html-parser.wit). Optional WIT fields are required-but-nullable: the key is always present, with null for an absent option<>.

product-id.description: The card's data-testid with its `product-` prefix stripped (e.g. "5240876-EA-000")

subtitle.description: Product subtitle text (e.g. "12pk"), or null when absent

url.description: Canonical product URL: the card link resolved against the source URL, with the volatile `tr` query parameter and any fragment removed

image-url.description: The product image src, or null when absent

price.description: The displayed price, or null when absent

unit-price.description: The comparative unit price, or null when absent
